message:
fix: remove unused variable info_after_first

Follow-up to type check fixes - ruff correctly flagged this as unused
after the dead expression statements were removed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -274,7 +274,6 @@ def test_cache_hit_rate_verification(self) -> None:
 
         # First call should be a miss
         _compile_pathspec(normalized)
-        info_after_first = _get_pathspec_cache_info()
 
         # Next 99 calls should be hits
         for _ in range(99):
